message:
🐛 Fix CORS origin mismatch for HTTP routes (#870)

The kc-agent's allowed origins list only included HTTPS variants of
deployment URLs, but OpenShift routes may serve over HTTP. This caused
the browser CORS preflight to fail when loading the console from
http://kc.apps.fmaas-vllm-d.fmaas.res.ibm.com, preventing the local
agent from being detected (showing "Offline").

Add HTTP variants of known deployment URLs to the allowed origins list.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
